title: Rad's Mushrooms
description: A mod that adds mushrooms and other things related to them.
body:
**This mod focuses on adding mushrooms to the game and everything related to them.**

## 📖 Description:
**Rad's Mushrooms** is still in development and currently adds very little, but will add much more in the future.
## ⭐ Features:
**(NEW) Shockshroom**. A very dangerous mushroom, be careful because it can easily get rid of you. Shockshroom can be found in plains and windswept hills.![Shockshroom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2662b4c4441ada80bff4fd45e0e83f8607c9434b.png)
**(NEW) Lifeshroom**. A mushroom that restores your health when eaten. Lifeshroom can be found in flower forest, birch forest and plains. ![Lifeshroom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f3ba80e250b85a6c0fe4ada53c4007ccddf54e8.png) 
**Boomshroom**. A mushroom that explodes when destroyed. To safely collect it, simply dig up the block beneath it. Boomshroom can be found in dark forests, swamps and mushroom fields.
![Boomshroom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bca68546da1247e4a9348b9c0b863d5494f956b6.png)
**Glowshroom**. A mushroom that glows in the dark. It can be found in mushroom fields, dark forest and swamp.![Glowshroom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a0fdef259a32980325d1f5abf1d21e90dbc7fb4_0.webp)
**Bloodcap**. A mushroom that, if you step on it, you get poison. It can be found in lush caves, swamps, dark forests and jungles.
![Bloodcap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d53a628429502ed37e20c7f9fb057bbe78ad9222.png)
**Frostcap**. A mushroom that grows in cold places. When you right click on it, snow particles appear around it (I don't know why I added that, but I guess it's cool). It can be found in snowy plains, snowy taiga and ice spikes.
![Frostcap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9d08f4e7fc9733dcecfa10b7d6a601c4563eab0.png)
**Dreamshroom**. You can craft **Dream Stew** from it, which when eaten performs random actions, such as giving the player a speed effect, or spawning a creeper if you're unlucky. Dreamshroom can be found in flower forest, birch forest, plains and mushroom fields.
![Dreamshroom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dcb480366e08c9eeb4aef7cf644f360e10bf8f9_0.webp)
![Dream Stew](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3389b5af5e241b8517a0abdee0b12e95b95ed41.png)

**The mod also adds some achievements**
![Advancements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc6b503b121d733639a920980a2a4581aee950ab.png)
## ✍️ Feedback, Questions & Suggestions:
This is my first public mod, so I'm counting on your support. If you want to report bugs, have any cool ideas or questions, you can write to **radsmushrooms@gmail.com**
